category_sources: Official package README describes omekasy as converting alphanumeric characters to Unicode font styles: https://github.com/ikanago/omekasy
source_facts.description says it converts alphanumeric input to Unicode styles.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for usage and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ikanago/omekasy; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README/package description covers Unicode text conversion and command-line usage.
